basic_details.job_title: OAV Dongriguda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Dongriguda (OAV Dongriguda) Support Staff for Boys Hostel Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of OAV Dongriguda. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff for Boys Hostel Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A/B.Sc, Trained in Cookery, Experience in Cooking, HSC Pass
qualification.details: Warden: B.A/B.Sc with at least 02 years experience in Hostel Management Head Cook: Trained in Cookery Asst. Cook: Experience in Cooking Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC Pass

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://Nabarangpur.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download OAV Dongriguda Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Support Staff for Boys Hostel posts at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Dongriguda is 26th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Support Staff at OAV Dongriguda?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the Support Staff for Boys Hostel positions at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Dongriguda.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Warden post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Warden post, candidates must possess a B.A/B.Sc degree and have at least 02 years of experience in Hostel Management.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for OAV Dongriguda recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Assistant Cook position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Cook position is Rs. 6750.00 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post is HSC Pass.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Nabarangpur district, which is https://Nabarangpur.odisha.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Support Staff positions at OAV Dongriguda is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff recruitment is 27th May 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff posts?
